sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86978" key="prodiakate/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδια-κατέχω</orth>, <sense id="n86978.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hold first,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐν ταῖς ἀγκάλαις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.106</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
